untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of 'congestion zone', 'upward breakout', 'channel formation', and 'three advancing white bodies' pattern — these are composite multi-bar patterns not expressible with single-bar indicators. Additionally, the source data contains only performance statistics without specific indicator thresholds or success rates (marked AUTHOR_SILENT), making it impossible to construct precise entry/exit rules. The gravestone doji itself was approximated using wick/body ratios and price position at upper band.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture gravestone doji characteristics: small body (body < 0.01), long upper wick relative to lower wick, and appearance at resistance (close >= bb_upper). Entry conditions for channel/breakout/congestion pattern and uptrend confirmation cannot be accurately coded without composite pattern indicators. Exit condition set to close above entry (reversal signal per rule 8). Performance data in source (6.93%, 10.23%, −6.19%, −8.30%) could not be mapped to specific parameters.
